subcodes.first_line: The esteemed and noble presence of His Excellency, Khaleel Bey, hath now graciously arrived [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سعادتلو افندم حضرتلری عزتلو خلیل بیک شمدی تشریف بیوردیلر یوقارده کی اوتله
subcodes.subjects: @courtesy; culture [adab], @petitions to authorities, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
